# Docker Compose Template: .NET / C# Stack

```yaml
# {System Name} — Development Infrastructure
# Generated by AI-DWG | Stack: .NET
version: "3.8"

services:
  sqlserver:
    image: mcr.microsoft.com/mssql/server:{version}
    container_name: ${PROJECT_NAME}_sqlserver
    ports:
      - "1433:1433"
    environment:
      SA_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD}
      ACCEPT_EULA: "Y"
    volumes:
      - sqlserver_data:/var/opt/mssql
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "/opt/mssql-tools/bin/sqlcmd", "-S", "localhost", "-U", "sa", "-P", "${DB_PASSWORD}", "-Q", "SELECT 1"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3

  # Alternative: PostgreSQL (if chosen instead of SQL Server)
  # postgres:
  #   image: postgres:{version}
  #   ...

  redis:
    image: redis:{version}-alpine
    container_name: ${PROJECT_NAME}_redis
    ports:
      - "6379:6379"
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "ping"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3

  # RabbitMQ (if messaging needed):
  # rabbitmq:
  #   image: rabbitmq:{version}-management-alpine
  #   ports:
  #     - "5672:5672"
  #     - "15672:15672"

volumes:
  sqlserver_data:

networks:
  default:
    name: ${PROJECT_NAME}_network
```
